title: ‼️Ability to use Different Email Signatures on Sequences

posts.author: BillBan (Bill Banford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I am setting up an email sequence to go out to leads that we are unable to get hold of. I am setting this up to be sent from our office admin whom handles the new leads and is the one reaching out when the lead comes in, however, can only select my email signature.

Currently Monday only allows for one email signature per account holder. Preferably there would be a way to tie in the email signature with the individual designated to send the emails. In this case, the email received by the prospect sees it coming from one person, but the email signature from another.

What are you trying to achieve

Would like to be able to use more than one email signature. Ideally this could simply be tied to the email signature of someone in the people column, or able tied in with the “Send Emails As” option.
